title: The Revenge of Tag & Bink

"'''The Revenge of Tag & Bink'''" is a 10-page comic featured in [[Star Wars Tales 12|''Star Wars Tales #12'']], written by [[Kevin Rubio]], and drawn by [[Rick Zombo]]. This comic is considered part of the [[Infinities]]. Even the author now considers it apocryphal in the [[Star Wars: Tag & Bink|"Tag & Bink" continuity]].<ref name="The Return of Tag & Bink: Special Edition">''[[The Return of Tag & Bink: Special Edition]]'', p. 1</ref>

==Plot summary==
The story starts off with [[Tag Greenly|Tag]] and [[Bink Otauna/Legends|Bink]] hanging onto a pole in the [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc's]] gullet. Then it flashes back to one week earlier.
Tag and Bink are undercover as [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], and are meeting in a [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] with [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. Lando is also undercover, posing as [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Tamtel Skreej]]. They are discussing their plot to take the [[Carbonite/Legends|Carbonite]]-encased [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] from [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] ship, [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']]. Lando asks them to hit him and leave, and they do. Soon afterwards, two aliens come up to Lando and offer him a position in [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] organization.

Later, Tag and Bink attempt to stall Fett with excessive nonsense, while Lando tries to sneak onto ''Slave I''. Fett realizes what is going on and tricks the duo into revealing themselves.

He captures them and takes away their armor, leaving them clad in black stormtrooper bodysuits. He ties them to a pole, and kicks them into the [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|Great Pit of Carkoon]]. The pole gets lodged in the Sarlacc's gullet. Flash Forward to five days later.
The [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon|Battle of Carkoon]] begins above them, and Jabba's thugs begin falling into the Sarlacc. One of them unintentionally unties Tag and Bink as he falls. The two hang on to the pole as they were in the beginning of the story. They wish for a [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]] to get out, and, lo and behold, Fett falls into the Sarlacc's mouth.

Sometime later, they and Fett escape from the Sarlacc. They make a pact with Fett, saying that they will never reveal that Fett screams like a girl, and that he was not defeated by a blind man swinging a stick. They will say that he was at a bar in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]], with them and their two sisters. Fett runs off, shouting that they are even. Tag and Bink may not trust him, but they have his gun.

==Continuity==
The "Bob's Big Boy" logo can be seen on the menus in the cantina. [[Wikipedia:List of Monsters, Inc. characters|Sully and Mike]] from [[Wikipedia:Monsters Inc.|Monsters Inc.]] can be seen in the [[Cantina/Legends|Cantina]] scene, as well as a [[Wikipedia:Xenomorph (Alien)|Xenomorph Alien]] from the [[Wikipedia:Alien (Film Series)|Alien Film Series]] and a [[Wikipedia:Predator (alien)|Predator]] from the [[Wikipedia:Predator (Film)|Predator Films]]. They appear to be having a [[Wikipedia:Thumb Wrestling|Thumb War]] referencing the [[Wikipedia:Xenomorph-Yautja War|Xenomorph-Yautja War]]. Also seen in the cantina is [[Ponda Baba/Legends|Ponda Baba]] with a [[Wikipedia:Transradial prosthesis|hook]] instead of a hand.
